case_title: CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES INC. vs. RADIO SEOUL BROADCASTING COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO SEOUL BROADCASTING COMPANY
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO SEOUL BROADCASTING COMPANY

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO SEOUL BROADCASTING COMPANY
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $87.07 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES INC.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - COMMERCIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CATHEDRAL HILL ASSOCIATES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RADIO SEOUL BROADCASTING COMPANY KIM, DONG DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED
